sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41552" key="e)pi/fracis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπί-φραξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (ἐπιφράσσὠ</foreign> <sense id="n41552.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">obstruction</tr_> of the earth, in eclipses, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.891f</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0725.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaximand.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
